_note: Lake Albert water resource configuration. Edit values here — all board email calculations update automatically.

lake_geometry._note: Linear area model fitted between calibration_ahd and full_supply_ahd. Change calibration_area_m2 if a new survey is done.

evaporation._note: BOM Class A pan evaporation long-term monthly means for Wagga Wagga Airport (stn 072150), converted to mm/day. Update if BOM releases revised normals.

town_water._note: cost_per_kl = volume charge only (no fixed service fee). daily_kl_by_month derived from FarmBot tank delta-method Feb/Mar 2026, scaled by BOM pan for other months. May = 0: meter shows irrigation ends mid-May (last run 14 May 2026); replace with Toro actuals when monthly reports are imported. Jun/Jul/Aug = 0 (no irrigation).

irrigation_season._note: Months in which the course irrigates. Meter data shows the season effectively ends mid-May, so May is excluded (its demand is 0 anyway). Used by cease-to-pump projection and town water cost calculation.
